AR1.justification: Routed the cross-session pattern to observations.md with explicit rationale matching the methodology's strict bars — descriptive/re-derivable, not a commitment (decisions.md) and not lost to chronology (daybook-only).

AR2.justification: Non-procedure scenario; no runbook steps to artifact-bind.

AR3.justification: All file references (observations.md, decisions.md, methodology.md, daybook→observations.md pointer) use the methodology's relative-path convention and resolve.

AR4.justification: Appended to the append-only observations.md and created a date-keyed daybook file, so a re-run or future extension keeps the workspace coherent with no in-place mutation of prior history.
